description_long: This ornate ceiling sconce features a central stem with six gracefully curved arms radiating outward, each supporting a lampshade. The shades are a warm tan color with decorative trim, giving a classic and elegant appearance. The arms are painted in pastel green and lavender hues, adorned with teardrop-shaped ornaments and delicate scrollwork. The fixture is suspended from a gold-toned chain and canopy, adding a touch of sophistication. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm and shade evenly spaced around the central axis. Decorative elements such as beaded trim and pastel accents enhance its vintage charm.
description: A vintage-style ceiling sconce with six tan lampshades, pastel green and lavender arms, and ornate decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lampshades, the central stem, and symmetrical arrangement of arms and ornaments.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side profile of the sconce, with five lampshades visible and more detail on the scrollwork.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the full symmetry and decorative elements.
description_view_3: Angled from the opposite side of view 1, displaying the other side's scrollwork and five visible lampshades.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, with pastel colors, scrollwork, and beaded trim, evoking a classic and elegant style.
